_comment: Authored by Claude. Daemon reads this on every loop. Update whenever thesis changes — daemon picks up within one tick. No numeric cap on alert count — every alert must be actively useful NOW (would you act on it with real money if it fires in the next hour?). Stale = remove. Signal-only / REMOTE / low-probability = remove.

level_alerts.note: Break of 0.707 = prior pivot gone. Short on retest from below. SL 0.713, TP 0.700. Risk-off + AUD first-to-bleed. Need M15 bear BOS + rejection wick on retest. Conv 3.

Price 159.245 (09:09 UTC M15, +0.08 vs prior tick; bearish M15 BOS 103 bars ago, bull FVG 159.022-159.115 unmitigated below). Only 0.20 below 159.45 fade zone (159.45-161.95 per MarketPulse/OANDA). Monitor M15 for first touch.
